properties.name: spring.ai.openai.api-key
properties.description: The API key to connect to OpenAI.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.audio.speech.api-key
properties.description: The API key to connect to OpenAI.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.audio.speech.base-url
properties.description: The deployment URL to connect to OpenAI.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.audio.speech.connection-pool-metrics-enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable connection pool metrics for the underlying OkHttp client.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.audio.speech.credential
properties.description: Credentials used to connect to Microsoft Foundry.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.audio.speech.custom-headers
properties.description: Custom HTTP headers to add to OpenAI client requests.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.audio.speech.max-retries
properties.description: Maximum number of retries for OpenAI client.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.audio.speech.microsoft-deployment-name
properties.description: The deployment name as defined in Microsoft Foundry. On Microsoft Foundry, the default deployment name is the same as the model name. When using OpenAI directly, this value isn't used.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.audio.speech.microsoft-foundry-service-version
properties.description: The Service version to use when connecting to Microsoft Foundry.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.audio.speech.organization-id
properties.description: The organization ID to use when connecting to Microsoft Foundry.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.audio.speech.proxy
properties.description: Proxy settings for OpenAI client.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.audio.speech.timeout
properties.description: Request timeout for OpenAI client.
